title: Data-Centric AI
short: We study how better data can lead to better AI. This includes improving data quality, diversity, representativeness, curation, and benchmarking for more reliable model development.
description: We study how better data can lead to better AI. This includes improving data quality, diversity, representativeness, curation, and benchmarking for more reliable model development.

title: Intelligent Tools for Healthcare
short: We design intelligent tools that help make AI more practical, efficient, and useful for healthcare professionals in real-world settings.
description: We design intelligent tools that help make AI more practical, efficient, and useful for healthcare professionals in real-world settings.

title: Simulation and Virtual Trials
short: We use physics-based simulation and virtual patient models to evaluate AI rigorously, safely, and at scale, especially in settings where clinical testing alone is limited or costly.
description: We use physics-based simulation and virtual patient models to evaluate AI rigorously, safely, and at scale, especially in settings where clinical testing alone is limited or costly.

title: Synthetic and Generative Data
short: We develop synthetic and generative data approaches to support AI training, evaluation, privacy-preserving research, and controllable experimentation.
description: We develop synthetic and generative data approaches to support AI training, evaluation, privacy-preserving research, and controllable experimentation.
